summary: DPI scaling and coordinate normalization restored across extraction pipeline. Bounding boxes are now correctly converted from Document Intelligence inch units to canvas pixel coordinates.

backend_normalization.logic: If unit === 'inch': x *= 96, y *= 96, width *= 96, height *= 96. Otherwise passes through unchanged.

page_dimensions.shape: Array<{ page: number, width: number, height: number, unit: string }>
page_dimensions.purpose: Allows frontend to perform additional scaling when rendering PDF at different resolutions

frontend_normalization.logic: Reads rendered image pixel size, divides by DI source size, applies scale to block bboxes
frontend_normalization.code_pattern: scaleX = imageSize.width / sourcePageWidth; bbox.x = rawBbox.x * scaleX
frontend_normalization.status: Already correctly implemented — handles all DPI conversions client-side for the designer import flow

multi_page_support.status: SUPPORTED via pageIndex field on ExtractedBlock and Field

validation.mock_block_positions: Coordinates in pixel units matching canvas coordinate system
